name: Papaya and Vegetable Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 large Papaya - peeled, seeded, finely chopped
1/2 cup Peeled seeded cucumber - finely chopped
1 tablespoon Seeded jalapeno chili - finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first seven ingredients in a medium bowl.
2. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
- This salsa can be prepared up to 4 hours ahead. After assembling, cover and refrigerate.
3. Allow the salsa to stand at room temperature for about 30 minutes before serving.
4. Serve with low-fat tortilla chips, celery sticks, or bell pepper strips for a healthy accompaniment.
